name: shopping-cart
author: SAP SE
description: UI5 Demo App - Shopping cart (with ESM migration)

scripts.serve:esm:source: bun run prepare:esm:source && bun run serve.js --dir . --port 8082
scripts.serve:esm:source:debug: bun run prepare:esm:source && bun run serve.js --dir . --port 8083
scripts.serve:esm:source:release: bun run prepare:esm:source && bun run serve.js --dir . --port 8084
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist dist-esm build-output esm-source-bridge-free dist-esm-source-debug dist-esm-source-release
